message: Welcome to such a cluttered place.
So this is your office, huh?
It is quite a cluttered place.
Wow, I really didn't expect it to be like this. I heard you were a skilled detective.
I thought you'd have your office in a more straightforward place.
Do you really believe that rumor about me being skilled?
I have a feeling it's going to be a bumpy ride.
Not that it matters, but this attitude...
You shouldn’t be so disheartened just from a glance at someone's office.
Well, I came all the way to this place. I mean, obviously I came here for a request.
Hey, you can take requests here, right?
Wow, I can't believe you're bringing me a request!
Meryl is a great woman. As expected of a top actress, you have a discerning eye!
What on earth is wrong with me... I'm so restless.
Right now, the actress Meryl is sitting right in front of me.
The real, genuine Meryl Ann Kline is inside my detective office.
Since opening my detective office, this might be the first real
request that has come in over the past two years.
Just a moment ago, the simple room transformed into a movie
Right now, it doesn't even feel like a room.
But still...she's an actress who looks beautiful in any situation.
She is wearing a big-brimmed hat pulled down. Perhaps it's to hide her face, but this probably just makes her stand out more.
I can't see well because the hat is in the way, but her expression doesn't seem bright at all.
No, no, I need to listen to Meryl.
Yuriko is at her desk, looking at the computer screen.
On the surface, she pretends everything is normal, but there's no doubt she's eavesdropping.
Am I just imagining it, or does it seem like they're all excited?
It's an old photograph that has faded to a bit of sepia, showing a baby wrapped in a lace blanket.
Isn't she adorable? That's my baby that I gave birth to.
Her facial features are well-defined; she's quite the beauty.
That's right. I bet she's grown into a very beautiful daughter.
It's a cute baby, but the only significant feature other than the mole under her eye is not that noticeable.
I wonder if it's really possible to find her just with this photograph.
I didn't come here for small talk, you know. It was tough to carve out time in my busy schedule.
So this is what your office is like. I heard you were a talented detective, so I thought your office would be more sophisticated.
As long as you focus on appearances, you must be third-rate.
When I received your business card, I learned you have an office in Chinatown.
But I didn't expect it to have this vibe.
I think if you could tell me a bit more specifically, I could find it faster.
So, where did you give birth to your daughter?
Ah, then it’s Manhattan. Back then, I was living in the Bronx.
I didn’t go to a hospital. If I did that, it would get out, you know?
Are you stupid? There's something called a midwife, right?
Oh, a midwife! So you gave birth with her help, right?
Who decided where to place the child for adoption?
I’m not really sure. But she might know.
So, she's a midwife. I believe she's of Italian descent, and her name was Anna, I think.
After that, I'm out of my depth. I don't know anything.
The clue is a photo and a midwife named Anna of Italian descent.
Oh, it took longer than I expected. I have to hurry. Well then, I’ll take my leave.
It's about the request. Yes, I understand.
What kind of request is it, exactly?
You see, I have a daughter.
Huh!? I haven't heard that before.
Of course not, I kept it a secret. It's not exactly unusual.
Yeah, it's a common story in Hollywood.
So, the request is for you to find that daughter.
I understand the request, but just being told to find your daughter doesn’t give me much.
Yes, I get that. Here’s a photo of my daughter.
Saying that, Meryl took a photo out of her bag.
The photo was faded to sepia. A lovely baby was wrapped in lace-trimmed clothes.
That beaming face hinted that she had likely grown beautifully since she was just born.
Hey, it's going to be fine, right? You'll find me, won't you?
By the way, what was the request about?
I'm feeling a bit uneasy. Can I really trust you that easily?
You came about the request, right?
But when I think about it, can I really say that so easily?
It's not like I'm here for an interview.
For now, just forget that I'm an actress.
Let's talk about the request, not work!
So, is your only job the next project from Director Fabar?
That's right. I'm not versatile, so I can't play more than one role at a time.
Well, when I get into a role, I really become that character. I guess anyone performing feels that way, right?
Why did you become an actress?
Because I was poor and had beauty beyond the ordinary.
Yes, I was bullied just because I was a poor kid.
But thanks to that, I am who I am today, for sure.
I'm not here just to hang out, you know.
What's the connection between the request for finding a daughter and the party?
Could you be a bit more serious about this?
I don't care about the party at all!
The last party was quite glamorous, wasn't it?
The party? Ah, that was Martin's. It was terrible; the guests weren't good.
For an ordinary guy like me, it felt like a dream. If it wasn't for that party, I wouldn't have met you, Meryl.
that's true. But usually, the parties are much more wonderful.
You see, this time, all the male actors were absent, right? Usually, everyone shows up, but this time two male actors couldn't make it due to other work.
I see, so that was the case.
Oh dear, for a guy you sure say that. But
...I didn't come here to be hit on.
I had my daughter 16 years ago. Back then, I was just starting out, and when I finally got a role, I was already six months pregnant.
So you intended to have her from the start?
I didn't notice. I had irregular periods to begin with. When things were finally going well and I was on cloud nine, my health started to decline.
So I went to the doctor and found out I was pregnant.
That was the first time I realized it. I honestly didn't notice.
They told me I couldn't abort since it was already past six months, and luckily, shooting started six months later, so I gave birth.
I thought she was so cute that I'd raise her myself, but
she was put up for adoption without me even realizing it.
So you want me to help you find your daughter?
Yes. Please help me get my baby back.
I think it's going to be tough to get her back. But at the very least, I hope you can meet her face to face.
I don't even want to imagine a worse scenario.
But why do you want to look for your daughter now?
I've worked doggedly to achieve my current position. Before I knew it, I had nothing I could call family, and at this rate, I'm going to be a lonely old lady.
Come on, you're still so young.
I'm glad you say that, but realistically, I still long for family. Right now, I can't help but desperately want a family.
there's no guarantee that your 16-year-old daughter will say goodbye to her foster parents and come back to you.
Still, it's a fact that I'm her biological parent.
Maybe my daughter holds a grudge against Meryl.
Do you still think that's okay?
Anyway, please find my daughter. Everything else can wait until then.
I think we can think about it once she's found.
Everything hinges on finding my daughter.
Look closely. This is the only bond that connects me and my daughter.
Um, is this photo the only clue?
What’s this, are you saying you’re not satisfied?
If you could tell me a bit more specifically, I think I could find it faster.
What? I expected a master detective, you know.
There's a signature from Ariana on the back of the photo, right? That's the name I gave my daughter.
I don't know if she still has that name now.
Hey, could you not make such a difficult face that worries the client? You're a detective, so be a bit more considerate.
The only thing left regarding my daughter is that one thing.
To be honest, isn't this a super difficult question?
It's kind of absurd to ask me to find a daughter I parted with when she was still a baby. I get the feeling, but still, it's unreasonable.
First of all, there's overwhelmingly too little information.
If this is my first proper case, is it God's way of telling me to give up on being a detective?
I can't back out now, so what should I do?
Even if I'm just told that, it's too abstract to know what to do.
What in the world is Meryl's request about?
I can picture that pained expression after the party.
It must be a serious matter.
I want to hear the details quickly.
Back then, I felt like she was lost in thought because of this.
Right now, I don’t care about the party.
Meryl seemed somewhat disturbed during the party.
Is the matter she's come to request about what was troubling her at that time?
After handing over my business card, I was told firmly not to talk about this to anyone.
